name: Web Cookie Forging - Stolen Signing Key Token Forgery
description: Detects web cookie forging via AD FS token-signing certificate theft, Golden SAML, ASP.NET machine key extraction, and JWT forgery. Covers AADInternals, DKM key access, and jwt_tool.
query: process where event.type == "start" and (process.args : ("*AADInternals*", "*New-AADIntSAMLToken*", "*Export-AADIntADFSSigningCertificate*", "*Open-AADIntOffice365*") or process.args : ("*DKM*", "*ADFSProperties*") or process.args : ("*machineKey*", "*validationKey*", "*decryptionKey*") or process.args : ("*jwt_tool*", "*jwt-cracker*"))
